# Bug: unless: guard is parsed but never enforced by the engine

> Bug ID: EMBER-BUG-001
> Severity: major
> Status: 🔴 reported
> Reported: 2026-06-06

## Description

Rule.Unless is deserialised by dsl.Parse (parser.go Rule struct) but engine.Run never consults it — rules carrying an unless: guard execute exactly as if unguarded. See BUG_REPORT.md for the reproducing recipe.
